factures.title: Invoices
factures.subtitle: Final documents · Credit notes · Payments
factures.draft_info: Draft: editable and deletable, no accounting entry.
factures.validate_info: Validate: generates the automatic accounting entry (irreversible).
factures.banner_avoir_body: Cancels a previous invoice in part or in full. Reference it in the notes.
factures.banner_devis_html: Need a quote or proforma? Head to the Quotes & Proformas page — an accepted quote becomes an invoice in one click.
factures.hint_facture_origine: Required for SYSCOHADA compliance. The list narrows to the selected client if any.

devis.title: Quotes & Proformas
devis.subtitle: Pre-invoices · One-click conversion
devis.confirm_convert: Convert this quote into a final invoice?
devis.lifecycle_html: Lifecycle: a new quote is « pending ». Once accepted by the client, convert it to an invoice in one click — lines and amounts carry over automatically.
devis.convert_intro_html: A new invoice will be created for {{client}}, carrying over the {{amount}} FCFA incl. tax from the quote. The quote will move to « Converted ».
devis.convert_validate_now_hint: Generates the accounting entry and stock movements. Otherwise the invoice stays a draft.

depenses.title: Expenses
depenses.subtitle: Paid charges · Pending charges
depenses.no_data_text: No expenses yet. Start recording them!
depenses.placeholder_fournisseur: Orange CI, Landlord, or type a name...
depenses.tip_create_supplier: Tip: create a supplier record with « + » to track per-vendor liabilities (account 4011).
depenses.convert_info: The expense stays in place but is flagged as converted. The fixed asset inherits the amount excl. tax, supplier and reference. Yearly depreciation entries must be generated from the Fixed Assets page.

comptabilite.title: SYSCOHADA Accounting
comptabilite.subtitle: Chart of accounts, entries, general ledger, trial balance and FEC export
comptabilite.gl_select_account: Select an account from the ledger
comptabilite.cloture_help: Closing locks the entries of the fiscal year and automatically transfers the balance of classes 6/7 to the profit account (13), then opens the next year with the opening balance entry.
comptabilite.cloture_effects_desc: Two transfer entries (class 6 charges and class 7 revenues) towards account 13 are posted to the OD journal. The next fiscal year is automatically created with an opening balance entry (AN journal) carrying the balance sheet balances. No further accounting entries can be added to {{libelle}}.
comptabilite.cloture_confirm: Permanently close {{libelle}}? This action is IRREVERSIBLE: no further accounting entries can be added to this fiscal year.
comptabilite.gl_prompt: Enter an account number (or prefix) to display the general ledger.
comptabilite.gl_empty: No entries for this account in the period
comptabilite.fy_intro: Closing locks the entries of the fiscal year and automatically transfers the balance of classes 6/7 to the profit account (13), then opens the next year with the opening balance entry.
comptabilite.cloture_effects_body: Two transfer entries (class 6 charges and class 7 revenues) towards account 13 are posted to the OD journal. The next fiscal year is automatically created with an opening balance entry (AN journal) carrying the balance sheet balances. No further accounting entries can be added to {{libelle}}.

immobilisations.title: Fixed assets
immobilisations.subtitle: Asset tracking · Depreciation · Disposals
immobilisations.amort_subtitle: Compute and post the annual depreciation charges for all assets in service.
immobilisations.amort_confirm: Generate depreciation charges for fiscal year {{year}}? All active assets will be depreciated.
immobilisations.amort_explanation: How it works: at each year-end, ComptaWest computes each in-service asset's depreciation charge based on its method (straight-line or declining-balance) and pro rata temporis. For the first year, only days after the in-service date are counted. A global accounting entry is automatically posted to the OD journal: 681 debit / 28x credit. You can rerun safely: existing charges will not be duplicated.
immobilisations.plan_hint: Entries marked "posted" are already recorded in accounting.
immobilisations.placeholder_motif: Sold to client X, definitive breakdown...
immobilisations.amort_intro: Automatically generates the annual depreciation of each depreciable asset and posts a single OD journal entry.
immobilisations.amort_explanation_full: at each annual closing, ComptaWest computes each in-service asset's due depreciation according to its method (straight-line or declining) and pro-rata temporis. In the first year only the days after service start are counted. A consolidated OD journal entry is generated automatically: account 681 debit / 28x credit. You may re-run safely: existing entries will not be duplicated.

parametres.title: Settings
parametres.subtitle: Customize your ComptaWest experience
parametres.language_help: Choose the application's display language. The change is applied immediately.
parametres.account_exists: {{email}} already has an account: the company will appear on their next login.
parametres.copy_failed: Cannot copy — please select the link manually
parametres.link_help: Share this link (WhatsApp, SMS, email…). It lets them set a password and activate the account. Valid for 7 days.
parametres.role_proprietaire_desc: Company founder. Full access equivalent to administrator.
parametres.role_admin_desc: Business owner. Drives the activity, manages members and all operational modules.
parametres.role_expert_comptable_desc: External ONECCA-certified firm. Exclusive owner of year-end closing and DSF tax filing.
parametres.role_comptable_desc: Internal accountant. Bookkeeping and treasury, no payroll or audit log access.
parametres.role_rh_desc: Handles payroll (employees, payslips, CNPS/ITS) without accounting or treasury access.
parametres.role_commercial_desc: Issues quotes, proformas and invoices. Reads the product catalog without seeing purchase prices.
parametres.role_magasinier_desc: Manages stock movements and inventories, without access to supplier purchase prices.
parametres.role_auditeur_desc: Statutory auditor. Read-only on all modules to certify the accounts.
parametres.role_user_desc: Read access and limited entry depending on modules (legacy role).

tresorerie.form_no_overdraft_info: Strict block: no outflow can make the balance negative.
tresorerie.import_choose_file: Click to choose a CSV file

rh.title: Payroll & HR
rh.subtitle: Personnel management, SYSCOHADA payslips and social declarations
rh.cnps_info: Contribution rates are automatically applied according to the CNPS scale and the Ivorian CGI: CNPS retirement 6.3% employee + 7.7% employer, family benefits 5.75%, AT variable (default 2%), FDFP 1.2%, apprenticeship tax 0.4%. ITS and CN are computed on a progressive scale.
rh.no_bulletin_period: No payslip for {{month}} {{year}}. Click "Generate monthly payroll".
rh.generer_desc_1: ComptaWest will generate a draft payslip for every active employee for the period {{month}} {{year}}.
rh.generer_desc_2: Already validated or paid payslips will be ignored. Existing drafts will be updated.
rh.generer_desc_3: You can then add bonuses, overtime and advances before validating and paying each payslip individually.
rh.generer_errors: {{count}} error(s) — see the audit log for details
rh.rubriques_info: The items catalog contains every possible payroll element: bonuses, allowances, deductions, contributions. System items are preset according to CI regulations and cannot be deleted (but their rates/values can be edited).
